mutators.name: recordMaterialInput
mutators.semantics: Appends one InputRecorded event for a non-empty set of material-backed quantities and returns its input-log handle; the created handle uses replica-scoped client id (prefix_replicaId~counter); collision-free by construction, no merge step needed.

projections.name: listInputLogs
projections.semantics: Returns input-log views materialized from events visible at-or-before asOf, optionally retaining only logs having at least one material quantity whose material has the requested material type; each result exposes its recorded quantities and status as of that time.

rationale: The source-specific behavior is a material-backed quantity field on input logs plus a Views material-type filter, so the surface has one domain event and one filtered materialized-view read. Drupal Views form/options/data-hook plumbing is collapsed into the typed materialType filter rather than exposed as UI APIs. The query is as-of-time parameterized because both newly appended input events and later log/material state events can change the projected result.
